series_metadata.series_title: Internal Revenue Service (IRS) 1099 Forms and Listing
series_metadata.series_description: The Internal Revenue Service (IRS) 1099 Forms are copies of the form physically mailed to the recipient. The 1099 listing is a computer printout containing the names of the 1099 recipients, address, Federal Tax Identification number or Social Security Number, and total amount paid by the Ohio Turnpike Commission.
